sentences.target: Die Tempo-30-Zone beginnt hinter der Schule.
sentences.reading: /diː ˈtɛmpo ˈdʁaɪsɪç ˈtsoːnə bəˈgɪnt ˈhɪntɐ deːɐ ˈʃuːlə/

translations.de: Die Tempo-30-Zone beginnt hinter der Schule.
translations.ipa: /diː ˈtɛmpo ˈdʁaɪsɪç ˈtsoːnə bəˈgɪnt ˈhɪntɐ deːɐ ˈʃuːlə/
translations.en: The 30 zone begins behind the school.
translations.es: La zona de 30 km/h empieza detrás de la escuela.
translations.it: La zona 30 inizia dietro la scuola.
translations.zh-Hans: 时速30公里的区域从学校后面开始。
translations.yue: 三十公里限速區由學校後面開始。
translations.pt: A zona de 30 km/h começa atrás da escola.
translations.he: אזור 30 קמ״ש מתחיל מאחורי בית הספר.
translations.vi: Khu vực 30 km/h bắt đầu ở phía sau trường.
translations.ar: تبدأ منطقة سرعة 30 كم/س خلف المدرسة.
translations.hu: A 30-as zóna az iskola mögött kezdődik.
translations.hi: स्कूल के पीछे 30 किमी/घंटा का ज़ोन शुरू होता है.
translations.el: Η ζώνη των 30 χλμ/ώρα ξεκινά πίσω από το σχολείο.
translations.id: Zona 30 km/jam mulai di belakang sekolah.
translations.ro: Zona de 30 km/h începe în spatele școlii.
translations.ja: 時速30キロのゾーンは学校の裏から始まります。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative feminine singular, agrees with 'Tempo-30-Zone' as subject determiner.
Hyphenated compound noun, feminine singular nominative; head of the subject NP.
Finite main verb, present tense, 3rd person singular; predicates the start of the subject.
Preposition expressing spatial relation; selects dative case for its complement.
Definite article, dative feminine singular; determines 'Schule' as object of 'hinter'.
Common noun, dative feminine singular; object of the preposition 'hinter'.

sentences.target: In dieser Zone brauchst du einen Parkschein.
sentences.reading: /ɪn ˈdiːzɐ ˈtsoːnə bʁaʊxst duː ˈaɪnən ˈpaʁkʃaɪn/

translations.de: In dieser Zone brauchst du einen Parkschein.
translations.ipa: /ɪn ˈdiːzɐ ˈtsoːnə bʁaʊxst duː ˈaɪnən ˈpaʁkʃaɪn/
translations.en: You need a parking ticket in this zone.
translations.es: En esta zona necesitas un ticket de estacionamiento.
translations.fr: Dans cette zone, tu as besoin d’un ticket de stationnement.
translations.it: In questa zona ti serve un tagliando per il parcheggio.
translations.zh-Hans: 在这个区域你需要停车票。
translations.yue: 喺呢個區你要有泊車票。
translations.ru: В этой зоне нужен парковочный талон.
translations.pt: Nesta área você precisa de um bilhete de estacionamento.
translations.he: באזור הזה אתה צריך כרטיס חניה.
translations.vi: Trong khu vực này bạn cần vé đỗ xe.
translations.ar: في هذه المنطقة تحتاج إلى تذكرة وقوف السيارات.
translations.nl: In deze zone heb je een parkeerkaartje nodig.
translations.uk: У цій зоні потрібен паркувальний квиток.
translations.hu: Ebben a zónában parkolójegyre van szükséged.
translations.hi: इस इलाके में तुम्हें पार्किंग टिकट चाहिए.
translations.pl: W tej strefie potrzebujesz biletu parkingowego.
translations.el: Σε αυτή τη ζώνη χρειάζεσαι εισιτήριο στάθμευσης.
translations.nb: I denne sonen trenger du parkeringsbillett.
translations.id: Di zona ini kamu perlu tiket parkir.
translations.sv: I den här zonen behöver du parkeringsbiljett.
translations.ro: În această zonă ai nevoie de un bilet de parcare.
translations.cs: V této zóně potřebuješ parkovací lístek.
translations.da: I denne zone skal du have en parkeringsbillet.
translations.ja: このゾーンでは駐車券が必要です。

tokens.explanation: Preposition indicating location; with static meaning selects dative case.
Demonstrative determiner, dative feminine singular; agrees with 'Zone' in the PP.
Common noun, dative feminine singular; object of the preposition 'in'.
Finite main verb, present tense, 2nd person singular; takes an accusative direct object.
Personal pronoun, nominative 2nd person singular; subject of 'brauchst'.
Indefinite article, accusative masculine singular; determines 'Parkschein' as direct object.
Common noun, accusative masculine singular; direct object of 'brauchst'.

translations.en: I'm sitting in the Wi‑Fi zone.
translations.es: Estoy sentado en la zona Wi‑Fi.
translations.fr: Je suis assis dans la zone Wi‑Fi.
translations.zh-Hans: 我坐在 Wi‑Fi 区域里。
translations.pt: Estou sentado na área de Wi‑Fi.
translations.vi: Tôi đang ngồi trong khu vực Wi‑Fi.
translations.ar: أنا جالس في منطقة الواي فاي.
translations.hi: मैं वाई‑फाई ज़ोन में बैठा हूँ.
translations.id: Saya sedang duduk di area Wi‑Fi.
translations.ja: Wi‑Fiゾーンに座っています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, nominative 1st person singular; subject of 'sitze'.
Finite main verb, present tense, 1st person singular; denotes posture, takes locative PP.
Preposition of location; with static meaning selects dative case.
Definite article, dative feminine singular; determines 'WLAN-Zone' in the PP.
Hyphenated compound noun, dative feminine singular; object of the preposition 'in'.

translations.vi: Khu vực này hôm nay bị phong tỏa.
translations.hu: Ez a zóna ma le van zárva.
translations.el: Αυτή η ζώνη είναι κλειστή σήμερα.
translations.nb: Denne sonen er stengt i dag.
translations.sv: Den här zonen är stängd idag.
translations.da: Denne zone er lukket i dag.
translations.ja: このゾーンは今日は閉鎖されています。
